params.cartoon_ip_theme: Havoc in Heaven大闹天宫, page 4, 3 core characters: Jade Emperor (left), Sun Wukong (middle main), Erlang Shen (right). Relations: Jade Emperor → orders capture; Sun Wukong ↔ Erlang Shen: fights him / stops him, core relation: rivals. Character traits: Jade Emperor ruler of Heaven; Sun Wukong fearless hero; Erlang Shen powerful warrior. Story Focus sentence: Wukong refuses unfair rules and shakes Heaven. Background: Lingxiao Palace cloud heaven scene, right decor: golden magic staff
